meaning: n.果肉紧贴于核的桃或梅子adj.果肉与核分离不开的
examples: Mean malate, citrate and total acid content were significantly higher in freestone peach than in semi-freestone and clingstone peaches.
It is expressly designed to automatically feed and align both freestone and clingstone peaches at a maximum rate of 320 fruits per minute.
